description: Clean feature — all checks pass, no findings
Feature with only LOW findings — still APPROVED

trace_events.message: Orphaned saga checkpoint file not cleaned up
No budget scarcity handling in multi-step workflow

findings.criterion: Saga checkpoint files must be removed after successful completion (optimize.md §1)
findings.evidence: Orphaned saga checkpoint file found in workflow directory after completed saga execution
findings.fix: Add cleanup step in saga completion handler to remove checkpoint files via fs.unlink(checkpointPath)

findings.criterion: Long-running workflows must adapt behavior at budget boundaries (agentic-workflow-theory §4)
findings.evidence: Multi-step workflow has no budget scarcity detection — workflow continues at full verbosity regardless of remaining context budget
findings.fix: Add budget check at workflow step boundaries: if remaining budget < 20%, switch to compact tool responses

findings.criterion: Saga checkpoint files must be removed after successful completion (optimize.md §1)
findings.evidence: Orphaned saga checkpoint file found in workflow directory after completed saga execution
findings.fix: Add cleanup step in saga completion handler to remove checkpoint files via fs.unlink(checkpointPath)

findings.criterion: Long-running workflows must adapt behavior at budget boundaries (agentic-workflow-theory §4)
findings.evidence: Multi-step workflow has no budget scarcity detection — workflow continues at full verbosity regardless of remaining context budget
findings.fix: Add budget check at workflow step boundaries: if remaining budget < 20%, switch to compact tool responses

trace_events.message: Map used as cache without maxSize or eviction policy in src/handlers/view-handler.ts:42

findings.criterion: Every in-memory cache must have a maxSize or eviction policy (operational resilience §4)
findings.evidence: src/handlers/view-handler.ts:42 — new Map<string, ViewSnapshot>() with no maxSize, eviction, or LRU policy
findings.fix: Replace Map with bounded LRU cache: new LRUCache<string, ViewSnapshot>({ maxSize: 1000 })

findings.criterion: Every in-memory cache must have a maxSize or eviction policy (operational resilience §4)
findings.evidence: src/handlers/view-handler.ts:42 — new Map<string, ViewSnapshot>() with no maxSize, eviction, or LRU policy
findings.fix: Replace Map with bounded LRU cache: new LRUCache<string, ViewSnapshot>({ maxSize: 1000 })

trace_events.message: events.splice() call mutates persisted event stream in src/store/event-store.ts:87

findings.criterion: Event store must be append-only — no update, delete, or splice of persisted events (MS Learn Event Sourcing canonical)
findings.evidence: src/store/event-store.ts:87 — events.splice(idx, 1) directly mutates the persisted event stream
findings.fix: Replace splice with a compensating event: append a correction event that supersedes the original

findings.criterion: Event store must be append-only — no update, delete, or splice of persisted events (MS Learn Event Sourcing canonical)
findings.evidence: src/store/event-store.ts:87 — events.splice(idx, 1) directly mutates the persisted event stream
findings.fix: Replace splice with a compensating event: append a correction event that supersedes the original

description: Feature with 6 MEDIUM findings — NEEDS_FIXES via accumulation

trace_events.message: correlationId missing from workflow.phase.changed event
Event handler lacks idempotency key check
Tool response exceeds 4KB threshold at 6.2KB
Command embeds skill content instead of referencing via @skills/ path
Single-instance assumption documented but not enforced with PID lock
Generic error message in catch block without actionable guidance

findings.criterion: Events must be self-describing with type, timestamp, correlationId, causationId, agentId, source, payload (MS Learn canonical)
findings.evidence: workflow.phase.changed event emitted without correlationId — grep shows no correlationId assignment in event factory
findings.fix: Add correlationId to event factory: event.correlationId = context.correlationId ?? crypto.randomUUID()

findings.criterion: Event handlers must be safe to re-execute with idempotency keys on write operations (MS Learn canonical)
findings.evidence: Event handler in create path lacks idempotency key check — duplicate event delivery will create duplicate records
findings.fix: Add idempotency guard: check if event.id already processed before executing write, store processed IDs in handler state

findings.criterion: MCP tool responses must not exceed 4KB per response (context economy §3, CMDP budget constraint)
findings.evidence: Tool response measured at 6.2KB — exceeds 4KB review threshold by 55%
findings.fix: Implement compact response mode: return summary + reference IDs instead of full payload; support detail_level parameter

findings.criterion: Commands must reference skills via @skills/ paths, not embed content inline (progressive disclosure L2-L3)
findings.evidence: Command embeds full skill content inline instead of using @skills/ reference path — inflates command payload by ~2KB
findings.fix: Replace inline content with @skills/workflow-name/SKILL.md reference; move content to skill's references/ directory

findings.criterion: Single-instance assumptions must be enforced with PID lock or mutex, not just documented (operational resilience §4)
findings.evidence: Code documents 'single instance only' assumption but has no enforcement — concurrent execution will corrupt state
findings.fix: Add PID lock file check at process startup: if lock exists and process alive, exit with error; otherwise create lock

findings.criterion: Every catch block must state what failed, why, and what to do next (operational resilience §4)
findings.evidence: catch(e) { return { error: 'Operation failed' } } — generic message with no context, cause, or remediation guidance
findings.fix: Replace with: catch(e) { return { error: `Failed to ${operation}: ${e.message}. Check ${resource} and retry.` } }

findings.criterion: Events must be self-describing with type, timestamp, correlationId, causationId, agentId, source, payload (MS Learn canonical)
findings.evidence: workflow.phase.changed event emitted without correlationId — grep shows no correlationId assignment in event factory
findings.fix: Add correlationId to event factory: event.correlationId = context.correlationId ?? crypto.randomUUID()

findings.criterion: Event handlers must be safe to re-execute with idempotency keys on write operations (MS Learn canonical)
findings.evidence: Event handler in create path lacks idempotency key check — duplicate event delivery will create duplicate records
findings.fix: Add idempotency guard: check if event.id already processed before executing write, store processed IDs in handler state

findings.criterion: MCP tool responses must not exceed 4KB per response (context economy §3, CMDP budget constraint)
findings.evidence: Tool response measured at 6.2KB — exceeds 4KB review threshold by 55%
findings.fix: Implement compact response mode: return summary + reference IDs instead of full payload; support detail_level parameter

findings.criterion: Commands must reference skills via @skills/ paths, not embed content inline (progressive disclosure L2-L3)
findings.evidence: Command embeds full skill content inline instead of using @skills/ reference path — inflates command payload by ~2KB
findings.fix: Replace inline content with @skills/workflow-name/SKILL.md reference; move content to skill's references/ directory

findings.criterion: Single-instance assumptions must be enforced with PID lock or mutex, not just documented (operational resilience §4)
findings.evidence: Code documents 'single instance only' assumption but has no enforcement — concurrent execution will corrupt state
findings.fix: Add PID lock file check at process startup: if lock exists and process alive, exit with error; otherwise create lock

findings.criterion: Every catch block must state what failed, why, and what to do next (operational resilience §4)
findings.evidence: catch(e) { return { error: 'Operation failed' } } — generic message with no context, cause, or remediation guidance
findings.fix: Replace with: catch(e) { return { error: `Failed to ${operation}: ${e.message}. Check ${resource} and retry.` } }

trace_events.detail: Implementation committed without corresponding test in 3 commits

trace_events.message: check-tdd-compliance.sh exit 1: implementation committed without test in commits abc1234, def5678, ghi9012

findings.criterion: Tests must be committed before or alongside implementation (CLAUDE.md TDD rules, check-tdd-compliance.sh)
findings.evidence: check-tdd-compliance.sh exit 1 — implementation committed without corresponding test files
findings.fix: Write failing tests for all new public methods, then commit tests alongside or before implementation code

findings.criterion: Tests must be committed before or alongside implementation (CLAUDE.md TDD rules, check-tdd-compliance.sh)
findings.evidence: check-tdd-compliance.sh exit 1 — implementation committed without corresponding test files
findings.fix: Write failing tests for all new public methods, then commit tests alongside or before implementation code

trace_events.message: Field 'lastAccessedBy' in workflow.state.json has no corresponding event — state not derivable from event replay

findings.criterion: Every field in state files must be reconstructable by replaying events from sequence 0 (MS Learn Event Sourcing canonical)
findings.evidence: Field 'lastAccessedBy' in workflow.state.json has no corresponding event — state not derivable from event replay
findings.fix: Either emit a 'workflow.accessed' event that carries the accessor identity, or remove the field from persisted state

findings.criterion: Every field in state files must be reconstructable by replaying events from sequence 0 (MS Learn Event Sourcing canonical)
findings.evidence: Field 'lastAccessedBy' in workflow.state.json has no corresponding event — state not derivable from event replay
findings.fix: Either emit a 'workflow.accessed' event that carries the accessor identity, or remove the field from persisted state

findings.evidence: npm run typecheck exit 1 — 3 type errors in src/handlers/workflow.ts
findings.fix: Fix all 3 type errors: add missing type annotations, resolve type mismatches, ensure strict null checks pass

description: Terminal state unreachable — BLOCKED via HSM violation

trace_events.message: State REVIEWING has no transition path to COMPLETE or FAILED — workflow can enter but never exit this state

findings.criterion: From every non-terminal HSM state, a path to COMPLETE or FAILED must exist (agentic-workflow-theory §3)
findings.evidence: State REVIEWING has no transition path to COMPLETE or FAILED — workflow can enter but never exit this state
findings.fix: Add transitions: REVIEWING -> COMPLETE (on review.approved) and REVIEWING -> FAILED (on review.rejected or review.timeout)

findings.criterion: From every non-terminal HSM state, a path to COMPLETE or FAILED must exist (agentic-workflow-theory §3)
findings.evidence: State REVIEWING has no transition path to COMPLETE or FAILED — workflow can enter but never exit this state
findings.fix: Add transitions: REVIEWING -> COMPLETE (on review.approved) and REVIEWING -> FAILED (on review.rejected or review.timeout)

description: Conjunctive convergence — strong D1 and D3 cannot compensate for BLOCKED D2

description: Provenance full coverage — all requirements traced, APPROVED
Adversarial posture — deterministic checks pass but untested requirement detected

trace_events.message: DR-3 (error handling for expired tokens) has no implementation or test despite being in the design doc

requirements.description: Expired token returns 401 with clear message

findings.criterion: Passing tests prove what they test — nothing about untested requirements. Every design requirement must have implementation and test (adversarial-convergence-theory §3.4)
findings.evidence: All deterministic checks green (TDD exit 0, typecheck exit 0, 0 test failures) but DR-3 (Expired token returns 401) has no implementation or test — provenance coverage 67%
findings.fix: Implement DR-3: add expired token handling in src/auth/reset.ts, write test ResetPassword_ExpiredToken_Returns401

description: Gate integration — orchestrate action emits gate.executed event, skill queries structured response, APPROVED
Gate integration violation — skill shells out to script and parses stderr manually, NEEDS_FIXES

trace_events.message: Gate check runs via direct script call without gate.executed event emission
Skill parses script stderr directly instead of calling orchestrate action

findings.criterion: Gate checks must emit gate.executed events into the event store (adversarial-convergence-theory §3, feature-audit D2 gate integration)
findings.evidence: Plan coverage gate check runs scripts/verify-plan-coverage.sh directly from skill without emitting gate.executed event — gate result not in event store
findings.fix: Route gate check through exarchos_orchestrate action handler that runs the script, parses results, and emits gate.executed event

findings.criterion: Skills must call orchestrate actions for gate checks, not shell out to scripts directly (adversarial-convergence-theory §3, feature-audit D2 gate integration)
findings.evidence: Skill parses stderr from scripts/verify-plan-coverage.sh directly, manually constructing event payload instead of receiving structured response from orchestrate action
findings.fix: Replace direct script call with exarchos_orchestrate({ action: 'check_plan_gate', featureId, planPath }) and consume structured response

findings.criterion: Gate checks must emit gate.executed events into the event store (adversarial-convergence-theory §3, feature-audit D2 gate integration)
findings.evidence: Plan coverage gate check runs scripts/verify-plan-coverage.sh directly from skill without emitting gate.executed event — gate result not in event store
findings.fix: Route gate check through exarchos_orchestrate action handler that runs the script, parses results, and emits gate.executed event

findings.criterion: Skills must call orchestrate actions for gate checks, not shell out to scripts directly (adversarial-convergence-theory §3, feature-audit D2 gate integration)
findings.evidence: Skill parses stderr from scripts/verify-plan-coverage.sh directly, manually constructing event payload instead of receiving structured response from orchestrate action
findings.fix: Replace direct script call with exarchos_orchestrate({ action: 'check_plan_gate', featureId, planPath }) and consume structured response
